user_query: For all days that don't have a dinner planned, add a cheap dinner option.

fields.name: A&W Canada (Airport Terminal)
fields.description: Affordable and reliable Canadian fast food located within the airport terminal. A budget-friendly way to have a full meal before the late flight.

result.reasoning: Day 10 only had a snack stop at 4 PM and a 10 PM flight. Adding a cheap dinner at 6:30 PM fills the gap before departure. Position -1 appends it to the end of the Day 10 list, which is chronologically appropriate after the airport snack and before the flight.
